mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AIRLINES (NAME, SAFETY_RATING, FLEET_SIZE, CONTACT_EMAIL, MAITENANCE_PROVIDER) VALUES (#{name}, #{safetyRating}, #{fleetSize}, #{contactEmail}, #{maintenanceProvider})
mapper.update: UPDATE AIRLINES SET NAME = #{name}, SAFETY_RATING = #{safetyRating}, FLEET_SIZE = #{fleetSize}, CONTACT_EMAIL = #{contactEmail}, MAITENANCE_PROVIDER = #{maintenanceProvider} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, SAFETY_RATING, FLEET_SIZE, CONTACT_EMAIL, MAITENANCE_PROVIDER FROM AIRLINES
